text: Welcome! You’re approved as a mentor. Please review the mentor guidelines and opt in to the next onboarding call so we can introduce you to the mentee matching system.
Welcome to the community! You’re in as a member. Start by reading the community rules and introducing yourself in #introductions.
Welcome! You’re approved as an event helper. Check the #events channel for upcoming activities and sign up to assist with at least one event this month.
Welcome aboard! You’re approved as a moderator. Please review the moderation guidelines and start by shadowing an existing mod in the next week.
